name: Dog Fest Chicken Fillet Bars 90G
description: These chicken bars are made of pure chicken fillet parts. Chewy, easy to break into smaller pieces, they always come in handy. No dog can resist. Composition: chicken, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 50, crude fat 4, crude fiber 0.3, crude ash 4, moisture 16.
